articles.title: SEC Publishes Draft Strategic Plan for Public Comment
articles.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission today published a Draft Strategic Plan that focuses on returning the agency to the core mission set by Congress more than 90 years

articles.title: Michael Burry says the SEC's plan to trade stocks like crypto could create a nightmare for investors
What Exactly Is Agentic AI, and Why Are Some Stocks Blowing Up Because of It?
Trump still protected from tax enforcement, but anti-weaponization fund is dead, Blanche says
articles.summary: The DOJ's $1.8 billion fund faced strong criticism because it could have compensated people convicted of crimes related to the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol Riot.

articles.title: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk
articles.summary: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk

articles.title: “马斯克们”要渡过那血海
articles.summary: 刘远举：现在很多人都盼望星辰大海、登陆火星。其实，在人类观念上趋同之前，掌握越高的能级，意味着世界越不安全。

articles.title: Sezzle (SEZL): A Mispriced Opportunity?
What Makes Hilton Grand (HGV) an Investment Bet?
在新的叙事下，德国还会是欧盟对华强硬派的制衡力量吗？
articles.summary: 张冬方：在德国现届政府中，上任前的默茨一度被期待采取更强硬的对华立场。但在上任后访华时，他却展现出友好且务实的对话姿态。

articles.title: Lex专栏：硅谷巨额筹资令人担忧
articles.summary: 硅谷正在吸走越来越多资金，同时供应大量股票和债券。如果说科技公司的投资曾经是它们自己的事情，那么这些投资现在已经变成每个人的事情。

articles.title: 美国将新建铀浓缩厂强化核燃料供应链
articles.summary: 美国针对俄罗斯核燃料的进口禁令将在2028年全面生效，由英国和荷兰政府部分持股的Urenco将在新墨西哥州新建一座铀浓缩厂。

articles.title: Three quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
articles.summary: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

articles.title: King told me Post Office scandal was 'dreadful', says oldest victim
articles.summary: Betty Brown says she is accepting the honour on behalf of all the victims of the scandal.
